args: [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -x "$PLUGIN_ROOT/bin/relay" ] && exec "$PLUGIN_ROOT/bin/relay" bus; p=$(ls -td -- "$HOME"/.codex/plugins/cache/*/session-relay/*/bin/relay 2>/dev/null | head -n1); [ -n "$p" ] || { echo 'session-relay: bin/relay not found (no PLUGIN_ROOT env, nothing under ~/.codex/plugins/cache)' >&2; exit 1; }; exec "$p" bus
